_comment: FORGE: voice-over script, one line per scene. `scene` must match SCENE_ORDER in narration.ts; keep `text` aligned with that scene's Caption. `voice` is a Kokoro voice (https://github.com/remsky/Kokoro-FastAPI) mapped to state.context.tone, e.g. af_heart (calm), af_bella (energetic), am_adam (authoritative).

lines.text: Meet the extension that does one thing, and does it well — right where you already work.
Click the toolbar icon and everything you need is one tap away — no tabs, no setup, no friction.
It works in context, on the pages you visit, so you stay in your flow instead of switching away.
Install it from the Chrome Web Store today, and get started in seconds.
